specClauses: ENGINEERING_SPEC.md § Deployment code identity: select an ABI only after the terminal runtime hash matches.
ENGINEERING_SPEC.md § Deployment code identity: an undeclared or unsupported pattern returns unknown for dependent semantic reads; Aegis never guesses a proxy type from explorer labels.
ENGINEERING_SPEC.md § Tests: ABI/code-hash mismatch prevents decoding.
THREAT_MODEL.md threat table, Proxy or ABI mismatch: resolve implementation and runtime code hash before selecting a code-hash-scoped ABI.
THREAT_MODEL.md § Required adversarial tests, items 8 and 18.
